title: SONOS Era 100 Wireless Multi-room Speaker with Amazon Alexa - White
subtitle: SONOS Era 100 Wireless
overview: They say good things come in small packages. This Sonos Era 100's compact design lets you place it anywhere in the house, so you can get your groove on wherever the rhythm takes you. Don't let its size fool you though - the separate woofer and tweeter speakers provide a wide acoustic range, high degree of clarity, and depth of sound. Download the Sonos app and things get really clever. TruePlay tuning technology analyses the acoustics of your room and then tweaks the EQ of the speaker, so your tunes sound at their best. It's like having your own sound guy in the house.Good to know- With WiFi and Bluetooth, you can easily stream from any of your devices with no ugly cables in sight- Pair it with additional Sonos speakers (sold separately) for a wider stereo sound, or create your own surround sound system for movie night- It's super-simple to set up – just plug it in, connect your device, open the Sonos app and you're good to go- There's loads of free music, original content and live sta
key_features: Wirelessly connect to other Sonos speakers

title: SONOS Roam 2 Portable Wireless Multi-room Speaker with Amazon Alexa - Black
subtitle: SONOS Roam 2 Portable
overview: Wherever your adventures take you, this Sonos Roam 2 will provide the soundtrack. It's precision-engineered drivers kick out crystal clear sound with a low end that would make speakers twice the size green with envy. Better still, Automatic Trueplay fine tunes the sound based on your surroundings so it'll always sound its best. Even the best adventures have a few bumps in the road. Fortunately, it's built like a tank and the IP67 rating means it's not afraid of a little rain or dust. And with up to 10 hours of playback on a single charge, you won't be constantly looking for the next plug socket on your travels.Good to know- It's got Amazon Alexa built in so you can use it to control your smart home set up- Download the Sonos app and browse tons of music, audiobooks and radio stations- Hands full? Sonos Voice Control lets you skip tracks or crank the volume using just your voice- Connect it to another compatible speaker (sold separately) for a wide stereo sound- Enjoy fast wireless char

title: JBL PartyBox Ultimate Portable Wireless Multi-room Speaker - Black
subtitle: JBL PartyBox Ultimate Portable
overview: Be the life and soul of any party with this JBL Partybox Ultimate. Fill any space with Original JBL Pro Sound and your slamming tunes will sound crystal clear with plenty of low end thump. Dolby Atmos adds an epic 3-dimensional effect to your music, so you'll feel it coming at you from every direction, just like at a concert. But the fun doesn't stop there. Turn on the multi-dimensional LED dynamic lightshow and treat your guests to a sensory experience they won't soon forget. It includes a starry night effect, light trails and strobes that sync perfectly to the beat – it's like a condensed Pink Floyd concert in your front room!Good to know- The dual mic and guitar inputs let you unleash your inner rock star on the party- Download the JBL One app to tweak the EQ settings and customise the colours of the lighting effects- Create a fun and unique vibe at your party with interactive DJ effects on the JBL PartyPad- Pair a second PartyBox (sold separately) and get a massive stereo sound sta

title: SONOS Move 2 Portable Wireless Multi-room Speaker with Amazon Alexa - Black
subtitle: SONOS Move 2 Portable
overview: Double the sound, double the fun. The Sonos Move 2 adds an extra tweeter to the original Sonos Move's design for stereo sound. A precisely tuned woofer brings the bass, while advanced digital signal processing works its magic to make everything loud and clear, even if you're outside. It even automatically adapts the sound to its surroundings with Trueplay tuning, so you won't need to keep tweaking the EQ. Battery life has been doubled too, giving you up to 24 hours of playback. It's the perfect excuse to hang out a little bit longer.Good to know- Just as happy outdoors and indoors, this durable speaker weathers spills, splashes, rain, dirt – whatever life throws at it really- When it's time for a power-up, the Wireless Charging Base comes to the rescue - recharging is as easy as setting it down- Create a stereo pair or go for a whole-home sound system when you group it with other Sonos speakers- Stream music and podcasts over WiFi or Bluetooth, or go old-school with a line-in adapter (
key_features: Wirelessly connect to other Sonos speakers

title: LG Sound Suite M7 Wireless Multi-room Speaker - Black
subtitle: LG Sound Suite M7
overview: LG's Sound Suite M7 speaker is built to flex with your setup. It's part of LG's multi-room system and plays nicely with Google Cast and Apple AirPlay speakers. That means you can add more speakers in different rooms and keep your playlists perfectly in sync. It also supports Dolby Atmos FlexConnect (DAFC), so expanding your home cinema system is easy. It detects where each speaker is placed and balances the sound for a wraparound effect. No fiddly wires or manual tuning - just immersive surround that adapts as your system evolves. The Peerless front array with 1.5” full-range units and a woofer bring voices and instruments to life. The up-firing driver bounces sound off the ceiling for convincing overhead effects for 3D audio you can feel across the room.Good to know- Dolby Atmos fills your space with clear, multidimensional sound- AI Sound Pro analyses what's playing and automatically tweaks the clarity, balance and spatial depth- Sound Follow lets you use your phone to find the sweet
key_features: Spatial sound expansion with Dolby Atmos FlexConnect

subtitle: SAMSUNG Music Frame HW-LS60D
overview: Mimicking a chameleon's knack for blending in, the Samsung Music Frame is a master of disguise with its discreet customisable design. This unassuming picture frame cleverly conceals a speaker, giving you the best of both worlds with minimalist style and great sound. Pop it on its stand or mount it on your wall to suit your space perfectly. It's equipped with cutting-edge wave guide tech for a wide sweet spot so you can experience powerful and balanced sound wherever you are in the room. Streaming music, podcasts, and the rest is super simple with Bluetooth or WiFi – no wires, no hassle. Link it up with your Samsung TV, and voilà, your home theatre gets a sound boost. Q-Symphony keeps everything in perfect sync, so you can make the most of Dolby Atmos virtual surround sound – it's a bit of cinema magic in your living room.Good to know- The six speakers have been fine-tuned by Samsung Audio Lab for natural, clear sound with deep bass- SpaceFit Sound Pro calibrates the audio to the acoust
key_features: Wirelessly connect to other Chromecast & AirPlay 2 speakers

subtitle: BOSE SoundLink Flex (2nd
overview: The Bose SoundLink Flex (2nd Gen) throws out surprisingly big, bold sound. Yet it's super-portable, so you can bring the good vibes anywhere. As you'd expect from Bose, you get clear, balanced sound with powerful bass. And you can tweak the audio to your liking with the adjustable EQ in the Bose app. Because it's dust and waterproof, you can bring it along to the beach or pool. It even floats, so no worries if it lands in the deep end.Good to know- With up to 12 hours of battery life, this speaker will keep up with you well into the night- The tough, silicone-wrapped body can withstand drops, crushing, shocks, and rust- Take turns playing DJ – multipoint keeps the speaker paired to different phones at the same time- Pair it with another Bose speaker for bigger sound – choose from Stereo mode or Party mode- PositionIQ technology knows which way up the speaker is orientated and gives you the best sound- Make and take calls – or use your phone's voice assistant - with the built-in microph

Perfect for dance tracks, drum & bass, or anything with a drop. title: OAKCASTLE DAB500 Bluetooth All-in-One Stereo System - Black
subtitle: OAKCASTLE DAB500 Bluetooth All-in-One
overview: Get your music fix in one place with this Oakcastle all-in-one music system. Tune in to different stations and listen to your favourite songs on its DAB+ and FM radio. You can also pair the radio with your phone using Bluetooth or plug a flash drive into the USB port to stream your custom playlists. And the 60 W power output will make sure your music fills the room.Good to know- Pop those classic albums in its CD player- Use the remote control to manage your radio without getting up- The dual alarm will wake you up on time with the sound of your favourite station- If you don't want to wake the household you can plug in your 3.5 mm jack headphones

title: MAJORITY Pulse 1 Portable Bluetooth Megasound Party Speaker - Black
subtitle: MAJORITY Pulse 1 Portable
overview: Get your groove on with the Majority Pulse 1 speaker. A 6.5” driver and 1.5” tweeter fill your space with 80 W of sound. Crisp highs, punchy mids and bass that thumps - your playlist has never sounded so good. Need more oomph? Hit the Bass Boost and feel the floor shake. Perfect for dance tracks, drum & bass, or anything with a drop. Plus, you can turn up the energy with a dynamic light show that pulses to the beat.  Good to know  - Channel your inner pop star with karaoke mode and the included wireless microphone - Listen how you like - there's Bluetooth, a USB port and microSD card slot - Up to 10 hours of battery life will see you through into the night - Double the fun by linking up a second speaker for True Wireless Stereo (TWS) sound

title: JVC UX-D327B Wireless Traditional Hi-Fi System - Black
subtitle: JVC UX-D327B Wireless Traditional
overview: Top features:- Wireless Bluetooth connectivity for streaming songs from your phone - Hear more radio stations with DAB and FM tuners - Plenty of music listening options with a CD player, USB port and aux in - Remote control for your convenience BluetoothStream music wirelessly from your compatible smartphone or tablet to the JVC UX-D327B Wireless Traditional Hi-Fi System – Bluetooth R gives you a great way to share songs from your digital libraries and music streaming services.DAB and FM tunersOpen up a world of choice with a DAB radio tuner. You'll have access to more stations than with a traditional radio – each can be directly tuned to and you won't have to put up with static interference. If you prefer listening the traditional way, there's an FM tuner too. Store all your favourites for direct access with 20 DAB and 20 FM presets.Plenty of music listening optionsLoad up a CD from your collection and enjoy it in clear, punchy quality over the Hi-Fi's 10 W speakers. There's an aux-in
